likely_causes: Missing app ID in headers or parameters
next_checks: Check network inspector for headers
1001.suggested_fix: Ensure `appId` is sent in request headers for all API calls.

next_checks: Check network inspector payload for token value
7301.suggested_fix: Prompt the user to login again. Opaque tokens expire after 5 minutes.

next_checks: Verify credentials in dashboard
7303.suggested_fix: Double-check your `clientId` and `clientSecret` against the OTPless dashboard.

next_checks: Print raw body before parsing to verify no whitespace is lost
7305.suggested_fix: Compute HMAC-SHA256 of the exact raw body. Frameworks like Express or FastAPI might modify the body during parsing.

likely_causes: Too many OTP requests for this phone number / IP address
Rate limit configuration hit on dashboard
next_checks: Check rate limit configurations in customer dashboard
7020.suggested_fix: Wait for the timeout period (usually 1-5 minutes) or contact support to request limit adjustments.

likely_causes: User entered incorrect OTP multiple times in a row
next_checks: Confirm verify attempts on server side
7021.suggested_fix: Initiate a new OTP flow. The current transaction is locked.

next_checks: Check exp claim in decrypted JWT or verify response details
7414.suggested_fix: Use the refresh token to request a new session token, or redirect user to login.

next_checks: Verify whether the session has been invalidated or if key rotation occurred
7415.suggested_fix: Clear client side storage (cookies/storage) and prompt the user to re-authenticate.

next_checks: Check AndroidManifest.xml for INTERNET permission
Check connection manager state
SNA_WIFI_DETECTED.suggested_fix: Silent Network Authentication strictly requires a cellular connection. Fallback to WhatsApp or OTP if WiFi is active.

likely_causes: SDK initialization triggered before DOM is ready or component mounted
App ID is undefined at time of call
next_checks: Ensure your initialization logic runs inside useEffect or window.onload
7001.suggested_fix: Verify that your App ID is passed correctly and environment variables are loaded.

likely_causes: Bundle ID or Package Name mismatch with dashboard credentials configuration
next_checks: Check bundle identifier in Xcode or build.gradle against OTPless Developer Settings
7002.suggested_fix: Add your debug and production SHA-256 fingerprints/Bundle IDs to the Dev Settings page in your OTPless Dashboard.

next_checks: Verify the device is connected to a cellular/WiFi network
7003.suggested_fix: Gracefully handle network error status by showing offline/retry UI indicator.

likely_causes: User cancelled the Google Credential Manager or Google Sign-In prompt
next_checks: Check SDK responseType and cancel flag
7004.suggested_fix: No action required, but you can restore the sign-in button state so the user can try again.

likely_causes: Google Play Services is outdated or missing on Android device
next_checks: Verify target device/emulator has Google Play Services installed
7005.suggested_fix: Advise the user to update Google Play Services, or hide Google Auth buttons if unavailable.

likely_causes: SNA failed and all smart auth fallback channels (WhatsApp/SMS) have failed or exhausted
next_checks: Check fallback delivery status on dashboard
9106.suggested_fix: SNA-only or Smart Auth flow has failed completely. Force manual phone/OTP verification fallback.

likely_causes: User backed out or clicked cancel on the WhatsApp redirect login interface
next_checks: Monitor callback trigger behavior in setResponseCallback
9107.suggested_fix: Let the user trigger WhatsApp login again, or offer alternative social sign-in methods.

likely_causes: Invalid phone number or regional block
next_checks: Verify regional configurations on OTPless SMS panel
9108.suggested_fix: Ensure the country code is prefixed correctly. If transient, ask the user to request a new code.

likely_causes: WhatsApp app is not installed on the user device
next_checks: Verify presence of WhatsApp package on device
9109.suggested_fix: Fallback to SMS OTP automatically by starting the phone verification flow.

likely_causes: Social OAuth provider login cancelled or connection reset
next_checks: Check social developer dashboard credentials
9110.suggested_fix: Restart OAuth flow or handle cancellations without crashing.

likely_causes: SNA not enabled for this carrier on OTPless dashboard
next_checks: Check operator name or MNC/MCC parameters
SP40003.suggested_fix: Trigger fallback authentication channel like WhatsApp/SMS since cellular network is unsupported.

likely_causes: Could not bind connection to cellular interface
next_checks: Verify connection manager cellular status
SP40004.suggested_fix: Ensure mobile data connectivity is active and preferred. Fall back to OTP/Social.

likely_causes: SIM card is not present or has been ejected during handshake
next_checks: Check SIM state manager API
SP40011.suggested_fix: SIM card unavailable. Prompt the user to insert SIM or verify via alternative flow.

next_checks: Measure cellular latency / round-trip-time to telecom endpoint
SP40021.suggested_fix: Increase SNA timeout limits, or fallback to OTP authentication.

likely_causes: VPN is active, routing carrier data away
IP address mismatch with carrier registration
next_checks: Check active network proxies / VPN interfaces
SP40023.suggested_fix: Ask the user to disable VPN interfaces or fallback to WhatsApp channel.

next_checks: Check carrier platform outages
SP40025.suggested_fix: Fallback to WhatsApp or SMS OTP verification immediately.

likely_causes: OTPless routing node or telecom gateway service is completely offline
next_checks: Monitor OTPless platform status page
SP50001.suggested_fix: Use local fallback options or check system health indicators.

likely_causes: Recent IMSI modification detected for user number
next_checks: Check sim swap logs on telecom side
70001.suggested_fix: Recent SIM swap detected. Block high-value transactions or enforce email MFA validation.

likely_causes: Operator did not return call status details
next_checks: Check active carrier call forwarding flags
P7334.suggested_fix: Verify that call forwarding is disabled on user SIM card before proceeding.
